tools.name: bars_get-v2
tools.description: Retrieves historical OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) price bar data for specified securities. Returns aggregated price data based on the specified interval. Supports multiple ticker symbols and various time ranges including relative dates. Required: symbols, from. Optional: to, interval, session.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols (e.g., AAPL,MSFT,TSLA). Required.

params.name: from
params.description: Start date/time for bars. Formats: YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, YTD (year-to-date), or relative values like 1MONTH/1m/1M, 1WEEK/1w/1W, 1DAY/1d/1D. Required.

params.name: to
params.description: End date/time for bars. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS. Defaults to current date/time if not specified.

params.name: interval
params.description: Time bucket interval for aggregating price bars. Supported values: 1m (1 minute), 5m (5 minutes), 15m (15 minutes), 30m (30 minutes), 1h (1 hour), 1d (1 day), 1w (1 week), 1M (1 month). Default: 1d

params.name: session
params.description: Trading session filter. Supported values: ANY (all sessions), PRE_MARKET (pre-market trading), REGULAR (regular trading hours), AFTER_MARKET (after-hours trading). Default: ANY

tools.name: bulls-bears-say_get-bulls-say-bears-say-v1
tools.description: Returns the latest bullish and bearish investment cases for a given stock ticker symbol. Bull cases present positive arguments for buying a stock, while bear cases present negative arguments against it. Required: symbols. Optional: page (default: 0), pagesize (default: 100), parameters[updated].

params.name: symbols
params.description: Stock ticker symbol to query for bull/bear cases

params.name: page
params.description: Page offset. For optimization, performance and technical reasons, page offsets are limited...

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results to be returned. Limit 200

params.name: parameters[updated]

tools.name: earnings-call-transcripts_get
tools.description: Retrieves earnings call transcripts for specified companies or call IDs. Returns full text transcripts of quarterly and annual earnings calls including Q&A sessions, speaker identification, and timestamps. Use date filters to retrieve transcripts from specific reporting periods or filter by ticker symbols for company-specific earnings discussions. Optional: tickers, call_id, page (plus 3 more).

params.name: tickers
params.description: Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols to filter earnings call transcripts (e.g., AAPL,MSFT,GOOGL). Returns all transcripts for these companies.

params.name: call_id
params.description: Comma-separated list of specific call IDs to retrieve. Use this to fetch transcripts for known earnings call identifiers. Takes precedence over ticker filtering.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Zero-indexed (0 = first page, 1 = second page, etc.). Default: 0

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results per page. Default: 5. Maximum: 1000. Use larger page sizes for bulk data retrieval.

params.name: date_from
params.description: Start date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2024-01-01). Returns transcripts from earnings calls on or after this date.

params.name: date_to
params.description: End date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2024-12-31). Returns transcripts from earnings calls on or before this date.

tools.name: earnings-call-transcripts_get-audio-files
tools.description: Retrieves downloadable audio file URLs for earnings call recordings. Returns signed URLs for accessing full audio recordings of quarterly and annual earnings calls. Audio files include complete earnings presentations and Q&A sessions. URLs are time-limited and securely signed for authorized access. Optional: tickers, call_id, page (plus 1 more).

params.name: tickers
params.description: Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols to filter audio files (e.g., AAPL,MSFT,GOOGL). Returns audio files for all earnings calls from these companies.

params.name: call_id
params.description: Comma-separated list of specific call IDs to retrieve audio files for. Use this to fetch audio for known earnings call identifiers.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Zero-indexed (0 = first page, 1 = second page, etc.). Default: 0

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results per page. Default: 5. Maximum: 1000

Use this endpoint to access income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement data. Required: symbols. Optional: asOf, period, reportType.

Returns comprehensive financial metrics, ratios, and company information from updated data sources. Required: symbols. Optional: asOf, period, reportType.

params.name: symbols

Optional: from, to, date. Returns the FundamentalsGetV3Response.

tools.name: logos_bulk-sync
tools.description: Bulk logos sync. Walks the full logo dataset via page/pagesize (optionally narrowed by updated_since); it is not a per-identifier lookup. To fetch logos for specific securities, use GET /api/v2/logos/search. Required: fields. Optional: search_keys, search_keys_type, page (plus 4 more). Returns array of BzhttpError.

params.name: search_keys
params.description: Only applies to v2.1 exchange logos (search_keys_type=exchange): comma-separated list of exchange MIC codes to filter by.

params.name: search_keys_type
params.description: Set to exchange to sync v2.1 exchange logos (filtered by search_keys). Omit for the default bulk security-logo sync.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of logo fields to return. Maximum 12 fields. Available: logo_light, logo_dark, logo_vector_light, logo_vector_dark, mark_light, mark_dark, mark_vector_light, mark_vector_dark, mark_composite_light, mark_composite_dark, mark_vector_composite_light, mark_vector_composite_dark, colors

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Used with pagesize for bulk sync operations.

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results per page. Default: 100. Maximum: 1000

params.name: updated_since
params.description: Unix timestamp (UTC). Returns logos updated after this timestamp.

params.name: scale
params.description: Scale image dimensions in WIDTHxHEIGHT format (e.g., 300x300). Images scale down only, never up. Default: 300x300

params.name: composite_radius
params.description: Border radius for composite images in percentage. Range 0-50 where 50 creates a circle. Default: 0

tools.name: logos_get-search
tools.description: Search Logos. Required: search_keys, fields. Optional: search_keys_type, composite_auto, composite_radius (plus 3 more). Returns array of BzhttpError.

params.name: search_keys
params.description: Comma-separated list of security identifiers. Maximum 100 identifiers. Type depends on search_keys_type parameter.

params.name: search_keys_type
params.description: Type of identifier being searched. Supported types: symbol (default), cik, cusip, isin

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of logo fields to return. Maximum 12 fields. Available: logo_light, logo_dark, logo_vector_light, logo_vector_dark, mark_light, mark_dark, mark_vector_light, mark_vector_dark, mark_composite_light, mark_composite_dark, mark_vector_composite_light, mark_vector_composite_dark, colors

params.name: composite_auto
params.description: If true and no logo exists, generates a composite image based on company name and brand colors

params.name: composite_radius
params.description: Border radius for composite images in percentage. Range 0-50 where 50 creates a circle. Default: 0

params.name: scale
params.description: Scale image dimensions in WIDTHxHEIGHT format (e.g., 300x300). Images scale down only, never up. Default: 300x300

params.name: max_width
params.description: Maximum width constraint for scaled images in pixels

params.name: flutter_compatible
params.description: If true, adds flutter_compatible=true query parameter to SVG URLs for flutter_svg library compatibility

tools.name: market_get-movers
tools.description: Retrieves market movers data based on specified filters. Returns stocks that have moved significantly during the specified session and time range. Supports custom screener and movers queries for advanced filtering. Optional: maxResults, from, to (plus 3 more).

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Controls the size of the response.

params.name: from
params.description: Start date/time for the movers data. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS

params.name: to
params.description: End date/time for the movers data. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS

params.name: session
params.description: Trading session to filter movers. Examples: PRE_MARKET, REGULAR, AFTER_MARKET

params.name: screenerQuery
params.description: Custom screener query string for filtering securities based on specific criteria

params.name: moversQuery
params.description: Custom movers query string for defining specific movement patterns or thresholds

tools.name: news_get
tools.description: This REST API returns structured data for news. For optimal performance, limit the scope of the query using parameters such as tickers, date, and channels, or use updatedSince for deltas. Page offsets are limited from 0 - 100000. Optional: page (default: 0), pageSize (default: 15), displayOutput (default: headline) (plus 19 more).

params.name: page
params.description: Page offset. For optimization, performance and technical reasons, page offsets are limited from 0 - 100000. Limit the query results by other parameters such as date.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of results returned. Maximum 100.

params.name: displayOutput
params.description: Specify headline only (headline), headline + teaser (abstract), or headline + full body (full) text

params.name: date
params.description: The date to query for news. Shorthand for dateFrom and dateTo if they are the same. Format: yyyy-mm-dd

params.name: dateFrom
params.description: Date to query from point in time. Sorted by published date. Format: yyyy-mm-dd

params.name: dateTo
params.description: Date to query to point in time. Sorted by published date. Format: yyyy-mm-dd

params.name: updatedSince
params.description: The last updated Unix timestamp (UTC) to pull and sort by

params.name: publishedSince
params.description: The last published Unix timestamp (UTC) to pull and sort by

params.name: sort
params.description: Allows control of results sorting. Default is created, DESC. Format: field:direction. Sort Fields: id, created, updated. Sort Order: asc (ascending), desc (descending)

params.name: isin
params.description: One or more ISINs separated by a comma. Maximum 50. Format: csv

params.name: cusips
params.description: One or more CUSIPs separated by a comma. Maximum 50. License agreement required. Format: csv

params.name: tickers
params.description: One or more ticker symbols separated by a comma. Maximum 50. Format: csv

params.name: primaryTickers
params.description: One or more primary ticker symbols separated by a comma. Filters by primary ticker association only. Format: csv

params.name: channels
params.description: One or more channel names or IDs separated by a comma. Format: csv

params.name: topics
params.description: One or more words/phrases separated by a comma; searches Title, Tags, and Body in order of priority. Format: csv

params.name: topic_group_by
params.description: Logical operator for topics query. Use 'and' to require all topics, 'or' to require any topic

params.name: authors
params.description: One or more authors separated by a comma. Format: csv

params.name: content_types
params.description: One or more content types separated by a comma. Format: csv

params.name: format
params.description: Specify the desired format for the api response

params.name: importance
params.description: Filter by importance level

params.name: importanceRank
params.description: Filter by importance rank (1-5)

params.name: region
params.description: Filter by region (e.g., 'ca' or 'canada' for Canadian content)

tools.name: news_get-channels
tools.description: Returns a list of all available news channels that can be used to filter news items. Channels can have sub-channels, but they will all be listed as their own item.

tools.name: news-removed_get-removed-news
tools.description: Returns the removed news data. Filters the results to only include items that have been updated since the specified timestamp. Optional: page (default: 0), pageSize (default: 15), updatedSince.

params.name: page
params.description: Page offset. For optimization, performance and technical reasons, page offsets are limited from 0 - 100000. Limit the query results by other parameters such as date.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of results returned. Maximum 100.

params.name: updatedSince
params.description: Filters the results to only include items that have been updated since the specified Unix timestamp (UTC)

params.name: parameters[date]
params.description: Date to query for calendar data.

params.name: parameters[date_from]
params.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

params.name: parameters[date_to]
params.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format

params.name: parameters[date_sort]
params.description: Sort by date

params.name: parameters[tickers]
params.description: One or more ticker symbols separated by a comma. Maximum 50 tickers

params.name: parameters[id]
params.description: ID

params.name: parameters[updated]
params.description: Records last Updated Unix timestamp (UTC).

tools.name: trending-tickers_get-ticker-trend-data
tools.description: Retrieve trending data for specific tickers, including rank and change. Returns aggregated trend scores and activity levels across different time intervals. Required: interval, tickers, source. Optional: timeframe, page, pagesize.

params.name: interval
params.description: Time interval for aggregating trend data. Supported values: 10m (10 minutes), 1h (1 hour), 1d (1 day). Required.

params.name: tickers
params.description: Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols (e.g., AAPL,MSFT,TSLA) to retrieve trend data for. Required.

params.name: source
params.description: Data source filter for trend calculation. Supported values: all (all sources combined), clickstream (user interaction data), logo (logo request data). Required.

params.name: timeframe
params.description: Time window for trend analysis. Optional custom timeframe specification for filtering results by specific date ranges.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Zero-indexed (0 = first page, 1 = second page, etc.). Default: 0

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results per page. Default: 1000. Maximum: 1000

tools.name: trending-tickers_get-ticker-trend-list-data
tools.description: Retrieve a list of trending tickers based on various metrics. Returns securities ordered by trending score across different time intervals. Required: interval, source. Optional: tickers, timeframe, time_from (plus 5 more).

params.name: interval
params.description: Deprecated. Use timeframe instead. Time interval for aggregating trend data.

params.name: tickers
params.description: Optional comma-separated list of ticker symbols to filter results. If omitted, returns all trending tickers.

params.name: source
params.description: Data source filter for trend calculation. Supported values: all (all sources combined), clickstream (user interaction data), logo (logo request data). Required.

params.name: timeframe
params.description: Time interval for trend aggregation. Supported values: 10m (10 minutes), 1h (1 hour), 1d (1 day). Default: 1d

params.name: time_from
params.description: Start time filter in 24-hour format (e.g., 09:15, 14:30). Use with date_from for precise time ranges.

params.name: time_to
params.description: End time filter in 24-hour format (e.g., 16:00, 22:30). Use with date_to for precise time ranges.

params.name: date_from
params.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-12-30, 2024-01-15). Use with time_from for precise ranges.

params.name: date_to
params.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-12-30, 2024-01-31). Use with time_to for precise ranges.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Zero-indexed (0 = first page, 1 = second page, etc.). Default: 0

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results per page. Default: 1000. Maximum: 1000

tools.name: news-quantified_get-newsquantified-data
tools.description: Quantitative news analytics with sentiment scores, relevance metrics, and market-impact indicators (per-ticker price moves at 30s-120m horizons, volume ratios, VWAP, support/resistance, analyst and EPS actions). Optional: page (default: 0), pageSize (default: 15, max 1000), updatedSince, symbols, date, dateFrom, dateTo.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Zero-indexed (0 = first page).

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results per page. Maximum 1000. Returns most recent data first.

params.name: updated_since
params.description: Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC). Returns data updated after this timestamp. Use for incremental updates.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols to filter results (e.g., AAPL,MSFT,TSLA).

params.name: date
params.description: Single date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Shorthand for date_from and date_to when they are the same.

params.name: date_from
params.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Returns data from this date forward.

params.name: date_to
params.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Returns data up to and including this date.

tools.name: wiims_get-wiims
tools.description: Benzinga WIIM (Why Is It Moving) items: concise, structured explanations of why a security is moving right now, each tagged to a security (symbol, exchange, ISIN, CUSIP) with created/updated/expired timestamps. Optional: page (default: 0), pageSize (default: 15), tickers, updatedSince, date, dateFrom, dateTo.

params.name: page
params.description: Page offset for pagination.

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results returned per page.

params.name: tickers
params.description: One or more ticker symbols separated by a comma to filter WIIM items (e.g., TSLA,NVDA).

params.name: updated_since
params.description: Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC). Returns WIIM items updated after this timestamp.

params.name: date
params.description: Single date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Shorthand for date_from and date_to when they are the same.

params.name: date_from
params.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use with date_to for range queries.

params.name: date_to
params.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use with date_from for range queries.
